name: Number of Substrings Containing All Three Characters
description: Given a string s consisting only of characters 'a', 'b', and 'c', return the number of substrings that contain at least one occurrence of all three characters.
constraints: 3 <= s.length <= 5 * 10^4. s consists only of 'a', 'b', and 'c'.

performance.stress_intent: exercise last-seen tracking over 50k abc strings that punish quadratic substring counting locally
